summary: Iteration 39: Comprehensive testing of Events & Applications + Payments pilot module. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Feature flag system, Events CRUD, Event dates, Public events flow, Application submission with QR payment, and Admin management all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in form field type selector, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: FEATURE VERIFIED: Feature flag check-access returns {enabled: true} for demo account
FEATURE VERIFIED: Events CRUD - POST creates event, GET lists events, PUT updates, DELETE deletes
FEATURE VERIFIED: Event dates - POST adds date, DELETE removes date
FEATURE VERIFIED: Public events - GET /api/events/public/{institution_id} returns active events (no auth required)
FEATURE VERIFIED: Public event detail - GET returns event with dates and spots_left calculation
FEATURE VERIFIED: Application submission - POST creates application with variable_symbol (10-digit) and QR payload (SPD format)
FEATURE VERIFIED: Payment settings - GET/PUT manages bank account for QR payments
FEATURE VERIFIED: Admin UI - 'Události' nav item visible only for whitelisted accounts
FEATURE VERIFIED: Admin UI - Event editor has all 5 tabs (Detail, Termíny, Formulář, Přihlášky, Platby)
FEATURE VERIFIED: Admin UI - Applications tab shows submitted applications with approve/reject/mark-paid actions
FEATURE VERIFIED: Public UI - Full flow working: event list → detail → date selection → form → submit → QR success page
FEATURE VERIFIED: Feature flag isolation - non-whitelisted institutions return 404
seed_data_creation: Test applications created during testing for 'Příměstský tábor Léto 2026' event
context_for_next_testing_agent: Events pilot module fully tested. Feature flag 'events_module' controls access. Public endpoints at /api/events/public/* don't require auth. Admin endpoints require auth and feature flag check. QR payment uses SPD format. Payment settings stored in institution_payment_settings table. Test event 'Příměstský tábor Léto 2026' exists with form fields (Jméno dítěte, Věk, Email rodiče) and 1 date.

verified_features.feature: Feature flag: GET /api/events/check-access returns {enabled: true} for demo account
verified_features.test_case: Backend test + UI nav item visible

verified_features.feature: Public events: GET /api/events/public/{institution_id} returns active events

Application submission: POST /api/events/public/{institution_id}/apply creates application with variable_symbol and QR payload

verified_features.feature: Payment settings: GET/PUT /api/events/settings/payment manages bank account
Admin UI: Events page shows nav item 'Události' only for whitelisted accounts

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Event editor has tabs (Detail, Termíny, Formulář, Přihlášky, Platby)
Admin UI: Applications tab shows submitted applications with approve/reject/mark-paid actions
verified_features.test_case: Playwright screenshot shows 2 applications with action buttons

verified_features.test_case: Playwright test completed full flow with QR code displayed

verified_features.feature: Feature flag isolation: non-whitelisted accounts blocked
